results.name: arc lightning
results.description: Deals X damage divided as you choose among one, two, or three targets.

results.name: arda
results.description: The world of the Lord of the Rings.

results.name: ardbert hylfyst
results.description: Warrior of Light of the first turned ghost. Essentially looks just like the Meteor Survivor from various FFXIV media and characters

results.name: ardenvale symbol
results.description: A circle-bound flame, the symbol of the white faction of Ardenvale on Eldraine.

results.name: arena effect
results.description: You and an opponent pick a creature you own, then they fight! (Or kiss, in the tunnel of love)

results.name: arenos karlaen
results.description: Captain of the First company of the Blood Angels.

results.name: argalith
results.description: A giant crystal at the center of Drannith, on Ikoria.

results.name: argoth
results.description: A forested island on Dominaria that served as the final battleground of the Brothers' War.

results.name: argyle
results.description: A pattern consisting of diamonds in a diagonal checkerboard arrangement, typically used on fabrics

results.name: arkbow
results.description: Vivien's bow.

results.name: arkhos
results.description: A Greek mythology-themed plane from the Planechase sets. The concept would go on to become a full set with [Theros](theros), which exists separately.

results.name: armament ability
results.description: An ability in which the P/T of one or more creatures can increase based on the number of equipment attached to one creature outside of the equipment's effects of being attached. See also [cranial plating](cranial-plating).

results.name: armcannon
results.description: Ranged weaponry mounted on top of an arm or outright on/replacing one.

results.name: armor
results.description: Garments designed to protect one from physical harm.

results.name: armoring
results.description: A toughness-pumping ability. See also [firebreathing] in red and [shade pump] in black.

results.name: arrow
results.description: As in the weapon, the kind shot from a bow.

results.name: art breaks frame
results.description: Art that extends out of the art frame, and over the adjacent borders or text boxes.

results.name: artifactify
results.description: Effects that turn things into artifacts.

results.name: artist matters
results.description: Cards which care about the artist for a card. See also [art matters](/tags/card/art-matters).

results.name: artist signature
results.description: The artist's personal mark, identifying the work as their own. (Artist signatures might be cropped out in some versions of the same art.)

results.name: art matters
results.description: Cards which care about the contents of art. See also [artist matters](/tags/card/artist-matters).

results.name: art media
results.description: Media used to render the artwork.

results.name: art mismatch
results.description: Sometimes artists misunderstand instructions, or arts get mixed up and misapplied.

results.name: art swap
results.description: These cards have art that was supposed to be for some other card, but were mistakenly placed on them.

results.name: art watermark
results.description: A watermark appearing inside the art frame.
